name: CVF Worker Return Author
purpose: Guide a no-commit worker in producing a properly shaped worker-return packet after completing all in-scope deliverables, so the reviewer/closer can validate and commit without rework.
useWhen: A worker has completed all required in-scope deliverables and must produce a return packet for reviewer acceptance before any commit.
doNotUseWhen: Implementation is not yet complete; stop conditions require BLOCKED_WITH_REASON; reviewer closure or commit is already in progress.
outputs: worker return markdown packet conforming to the work order's return packet shape contract under docs/reviews/
executionConstraints: read-only access to worker outputs; no commits; no session-sync edits; no front-door or handoff edits
authorityCeiling: read-only authoring of a single markdown review artifact under docs/reviews/
sideEffects: creates one markdown file under docs/reviews/; no git mutation
rollback: delete the worker return file if the reviewer rejects it
safeStop: mark Status: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON in the return packet and stop; do not commit
capabilityBoundary: no commit, no session-sync, no provider call, no runtime activation, no external-agent adapter
resolverBehavior: metadata-only; resolver returns identity and selector fields; does not open any SKILL.md or instruction body
loaderBoundary: loading this metadata never grants authority to commit, activate, execute, or expand external-agent scope
adapterContract: N/A with reason: external CLI/MCP adapter not yet authored; separate ASSF adapter work order required
adapterEvidence: N/A with reason: no adapter implemented in ASSF-T2
externalMutationBoundary: no external mutation permitted until a separate ASSF adapter work order is accepted
